# Installing Apps

The _App Manager_ page of the _System_ app lets you install, uninstall, and update apps from your local server.
For how to setup networking, see [Networking](../Networking)

## Navigating to the app manager page

First, to reach the app manager page, open the _System_ app and select _App Manager_.

## Installing an app

Press the `Install` button next to the app you want to install

## Uninstalling an app

Press the `Uninstall` button next to the app you want to uninstall

## Updating an app

Press the `Update` button next to the app you want to update
Note that usually the [auto update service](../Auto%20Update) will do this for you within five minutes of an update being available.
